textbook: 人教版 PEP 英语四年级下册

unit_test.title: Unit 5 My clothes 单元测评卷

questions.question: 'skirt' 的意思是'裤子'。
questions.explanation: skirt指的是短裙，裤子是pants。

questions.question: 'dress' 常用来指女孩穿的'连衣裙'。
questions.explanation: dress是连衣裙的意思。

questions.question: 'clothes' 意思是'衣服'，是这类物品的总称。
questions.explanation: clothes为衣物的总称。

questions.question: 当描述两个及以上的'帽子'时，应该说 'two hats'。
questions.explanation: 可数名词复数需要在词尾加s。

questions.question: 'Amy's' 意思是'艾米的'，表示所属关系。
questions.explanation: 名词词尾加's表示...的。

questions.question: What colour is your ______? It's white.
questions.explanation: 问句中用is，说明主语应该是单数，只有shirt符合。

questions.question: It's cold outside. Please ______ your coat.
questions.explanation: 外面冷，根据常识应该是“穿上”外套。

questions.question: These ______ are my father's.
questions.explanation: These are后接复数，pants（裤子）自带复数形式。

questions.question: ______ hat is this? It's Mike's.
questions.explanation: 针对物品归属提问用Whose。

questions.question: Are ______ your socks?
questions.explanation: socks是复数，由此匹配复数指示代词these。

questions.question: The blue hat is ______. (那是我的。)
questions.explanation: mine是名词性物主代词，相当于my hat。

questions.question: Where is my skirt? ______
questions.explanation: 询问地点用Where，回答应指向方位。

questions.question: Is this your skirt? ______
questions.explanation: Is this 开头的疑问句，肯定回答为Yes, it is.

questions.question: These are ______ pants.
questions.explanation: 名词后加's表示所属关系。

questions.question: No, they aren't ______. They are my sister's.
questions.explanation: 空格后没有名词，需用名词性物主代词yours。

questions.question: My red ______ (短裙) is very nice.
questions.explanation: 考察单词书写，skirt为短裙。

questions.question: Please ______ up your clothes.
questions.explanation: hang up是一个固定短语，意思是“挂起来”。

questions.question: Whose hat is this? It's ______ (迈克的).
questions.explanation: 专有名词所有格形式为在名字后加's。

questions.question: Wait! These are ______ (我的短裤).
questions.explanation: shorts是短裤，my是有主关系。

questions.question: 将下列短语与中文意思连线。
questions.explanation: put on-穿上, take off-脱下, wash-洗, dry-晾干。

questions.question: 将下列衣物单词与中文意思连线。
questions.explanation: jacket-夹克, sweater-毛衣, socks-袜子, coat-大衣。

questions.question: 连词成句：[is, Whose, this, hat]
questions.explanation: Whose + 名词 + is this? 是固定句式。

questions.question: 连词成句：[They, are, mine]
questions.explanation: 主语They + 系动词are + 名词性物主代词mine。

exam.title: 四年级下册第五单元「My clothes」综合检测试卷

questions.question: 'shorts' 总是以复数形式出现，因为短裤有两个裤腿。
questions.explanation: 类似pants, shorts, socks这类物品通常以复数呈现。

questions.question: 当我们说 'my shoes' 时，这里的 'shoes' 可以换成单数 'shoe'。
questions.explanation: 鞋子通常是成双出现，用复数shoes。

questions.question: 'Whose' 引导的问句可以用 'Mike's' 这样回答。
questions.explanation: Whose问归属，名词所有格可以回答。

questions.question: 'mine' 的意思是 '我的衣服'。
questions.explanation: mine意为“我的（东西）”，需看上下文具体指代什么。

questions.question: 'it's time to' 后面应该接动词原形，比如 'It's time to go home'。
questions.explanation: It's time to + 动作。

questions.question: Can you help me? I can't find my ______. (我找不到我的裤子了。)
questions.explanation: 根据汉语提示，裤子是pants。

questions.question: Your shoes are ______ the bed.
questions.explanation: 方位介词，表示鞋子在床底下。

questions.question: ______ are these socks? They are mine.
questions.explanation: 对物品主人提问用Whose。

questions.question: Are these ______?
questions.explanation: 句末且无名词，用名词性物主代词yours。

questions.question: I like the ______ dress. It's pretty.
questions.explanation: 形容词放在名词dress前做修饰。

questions.question: Sarah, please help ______.
questions.explanation: 动词help之后需用人称代词宾格me。

questions.question: Is this ______ hat? No, it's ______.
questions.explanation: 第一个空是Mike's hat，第二个空单独使用用mine。

questions.question: These are your shoes. -> This is your ______.
questions.explanation: These are对应复数，This is对应单数。

questions.question: That skirt is ______. It's not ______.
questions.explanation: 两个空后都没有名词，全部使用名词性物主代词。

questions.question: What are you doing? I am ______ my clothes.
questions.explanation: 现在进行时 be + doing 结构。

questions.question: It is time ______ go to school.
questions.explanation: It is time to do sth. 前面已有谓语。

questions.question: The blue pants are Lucy's. The red ones are ______ (我的).
questions.explanation: 名词性物主代词mine表示我的。

questions.question: ______ (谁的) pants are these?
questions.explanation: whose在句首询问谁的。

questions.question: ______ (那些) are Sarah's socks.
questions.explanation: 表示远处的复数物体用those。

questions.question: 根据单词写出对应的中文颜色。
questions.explanation: 考查四年级必备颜色词。

questions.question: 将下列指令与动作含义匹配。
questions.explanation: 本单元Let's do部分的核心指令动词。

questions.question: 连词成句：[I, like, that, skirt]
questions.explanation: 主谓宾结构：我喜欢那条短裙。

questions.question: 连词成句：[these, Are, Mike's, pants]
questions.explanation: Are these + 所有格 + 名词? 构成疑问。注意句首大写。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: pants, shorts, socks, shoes 等词由两个部分组成，通常以复数形式出现。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: These are + 复数衣物; This is + 单数衣物(skirt/dress/hat)。
common_mistakes: 说 'a pants' 而不是 'a pair of pants'
描述裤子颜色时用单数 'It is red' 而不用 'They are red'
knowledge_summary.tips: 记住裤子、鞋子、袜子都是成双成对的，所以单词后面总是有s。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: Whose 用来询问某物是谁的。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: Whose + 物品 + is this / are these?
common_mistakes: 混淆 whose (谁的) 和 who's (谁是)
Whose 后遗漏名词直接加 is
knowledge_summary.tips: 回答 Whose 提问时，最常用的方式是[名字 + 's]。

knowledge_summary.point: 物主代词 mine 和 yours
knowledge_summary.core_concept: 名词性物主代词起替代作用，避免重复。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: mine = my + 物品; yours = your + 物品
common_mistakes: 在 mine 或 yours 后面继续加名词 (如 mine skirt)
混淆 your (你的) 和 yours (你的东西)
knowledge_summary.tips: 如果空格后面没有衣服名字了，就选带s的yours或者特殊的mine。
